en: This doesn't make sense. Project Mayhem does not belong to us. We are not special. Fuck that.
ko: 이건 우리 것이 아니야. 우리는 특별하지 않아.

en: You should have told me. Hey, Tyler.
ko: 그런 소리 하지 마. 나한테 말했어야지. 이봐, 타일러!

en: God damn it, Tyler. What do you want? A statement of purpose? Should I email you?
Should I put this on your action item list? Oh, look. You decide your own level of involvement.
I will. I want to know certain things first. The first rule of Project Mayhem...
ko: 그럴게. 먼저 몇 가지를 알고 싶어.

en: Just shut up. I want to know what you're thinking.
ko: 네가 무슨 생각을 하고 있는지 알고 싶어.

en: Fuck what you know. You need to forget about what you know. That's your problem. Forget about what you don't know.
ko: 네가 아는 건 중요하지 않아. 네가 아는 걸 잊어야 해.

en: What do you think you know about life, about friendship, and especially about you and me?
What... What is that supposed to mean? What...
What are you doing? Guys, what would you wish you'd done before you died?
Paint a self-portrait. Build a house. And you?
I don't know. Nothing. Nothing. Come on. Get in the right car.
ko: 모르겠어. 아무것도. 아무것도 아니야. 제발, 제대로 생각해봐...

en: You have to know the answer to this question. If you were to die right now, how would you feel about your life?
ko: 이 질문에 대한 답은 알아야 해.

en: I don't know. I wouldn't feel anything good about my life. Is that what you want to hear me say?
ko: 모르겠어. 내 인생에 대해 좋은 감정을 느끼지 않을 거야. 그게 네가 원하는 거야?
